title: 'We're sinking deeper': Iranians brace for infrastructure strikes as Trump deadline nears
summary_full: Ordinary Iranians respond to the US president's threat to destroy Iran's power plants and bridges unless it opens the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: Ordinary Iranians respond to the US president's threat to destroy Iran's power plants and bridges unless it opens the Strait of Hormuz.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: threat to destroy Iran's power plants and bridges
